endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:analyzeEntities
endpoints.description: Finds named entities (currently proper names and common nouns) in the text along with entity types, salience, mentions for each entity, and other properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:analyzeEntitySentiment
endpoints.description: Finds entities, similar to AnalyzeEntities in the text and analyzes sentiment associated with each entity and its mentions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:analyzeSentiment
endpoints.description: Analyzes the sentiment of the provided text.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:analyzeSyntax
endpoints.description: Analyzes the syntax of the text and provides sentence boundaries and tokenization along with part of speech tags, dependency trees, and other properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:annotateText
endpoints.description: A convenience method that provides all syntax, sentiment, entity, and classification features in one call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta2/documents:classifyText
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
